reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle with 24 authored angle states and rotate frame indices in 15 degree steps rather than live rotating a single texture.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_planar_mirror_rotatable_16x96.png through AssetServer and map the 24 frame atlas to mirror angle states.
runtime_notes: Frame order advances clockwise in 15 degree increments from 0 through 345 degrees.
Mirror collision uses a thin Rapier sensor aligned to the reflected surface normal.
Atlas origin stays centered on the mirror midpoint so grab and release positions remain stable.

context.usage: Primary beam routing object that the player grabs, repositions, and rotates to carve new shadow corridors.

shape.silhouette: Tall thin mirror with gold frame ends, bright reflective face, and a visible central grip notch.

specs.texture: Clean reflective face with minimal violet tint and sharp gold frame highlights.
specs.shading: High contrast white reflection strip down the center with dark frame edges.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas is exactly 96x384 px with twenty four 16x96 frames arranged in a 6 by 4 grid.
Frame 1 and frame 13 form a 180 degree pair with mirrored highlight placement.
Grip notch stays centered on the 16 px width in all 24 frames to support precise grab alignment.
